meaning: n.取回,夺回,政府对公司超额收益或利润的征收vt.拿回,夺回,再体验,政府征收再经历,再体验
examples: I believe that he would be the best possibility to recapture the centre vote in the upcoming election.
She's trying to recapture her lost youth.
He was trying to recapture the happiness of his youth.
Commission recapture and other securities trading were also priced uncompetitively by custodians and executions compromised.
There are places to live, however, that would allow you to recapture those lost hours.
